title: Travel Ideas 2032 — India train + China commit
html:
TL;DR

  • Oct 17, 2023 restless-feet journal — "itching again to get out there and do a gnarly trip." Top of queue: India train trip (cover the entire country, then migrate east toward China).
  • The India-train idea cancels the Semester at Sea plan Yahir was prior considering — fall itinerary was places he'd already been (Egypt, Jordan, Vietnam).
  • Closes with the commit-line: "China it is….. Its settled, you have a structure, go get it, go be great and blaze your glory."
  • This is the decision moment that becomes Shanghai study abroad (fall 2024) — written 3 months before the China logistics todo kicks off.
  • Title says "2032" — likely a typo / aspirational placeholder; doc is dated 2023.

Notes

The doc is short (1 page) but operationally pivotal — it's where the China chapter gets committed. The reasoning is double-sided: the Semester at Sea itinerary is too familiar (he's been to those places), and the India-train idea daisy-chains naturally into China — turning a single trip into a multi-country migration arc.

The tone is the self pep talk voice ("go be great and blaze your glory") — characteristic Yahir self-address that recurs across pre-commitment journals. Sits in the same fall-2023 OSU junior year decision-stack as the year recap (which mentions the "middle east trip with brother" completed Sept 2023 — so Egypt/Jordan were freshly done when this doc was written).

Connections

  • shanghai study abroad · china chapter — what this commit becomes
  • 2024 01 24 china logistics — the operational follow-through
  • india · semester at sea · egypt · jordan · vietnam — the alternatives weighed
  • max effort commit · non negotiables for traveling — the operating frames
  • 2024 01 01 2023 year recap — same-quarter context (Middle East trip just completed)
